# 02 — Qubit Calibration
Full qubit characterization: ge and ef transitions.
Run after cooldown or when qubit params drift significantly.

%load_ext autoreload
%autoreload 2

import sys
sys.path.insert(0, 'C:\\Users\\Administrator\\Documents\\multimode_expts_tprocv2')

import numpy as np
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
from meas_utils import MultimodeStation
from calibration_helpers import (
    init_helpers,
    do_pulse_probe_spec, update_pulse_probe_ge, update_pulse_probe_ef,
    do_t2_ramsey, update_t2_ramsey_ge, update_t2_ramsey_ef,
    do_rabi, update_amplitude_rabi_ge, update_amplitude_rabi_ef,
    do_t1,
)

station = MultimodeStation(
    experiment_name  = '2600403_lmm',
    hardware_config  = 'hardware_config_20260111.yml',
)
init_helpers(station)
config_thisrun = station.config_thisrun
cfg_dict       = station.cfg_dict
meas           = station.meas
print('Station ready.')
## Qubit GE

qspec_ge = do_pulse_probe_spec(
    config_thisrun      = config_thisrun,
    center              = config_thisrun.device.qubit.f_ge,
    span                = 20,
    expts               = 300,
    reps                = 300,
    rounds              = 1,
    pulse_e             = False,
    prepulse            = {},
    postpulse           = {},
    sweep_other_param   = None,
    probe_pulse_param   = {
        'gain':           0.05,
        'length':         0.8,
        'freq':           None,
        'chan':           config_thisrun.hw.soc.dacs.qubit.ch,
        'sigma':          0,
        'sigma_inc':      0,
        'ramp_sigma':     None,
        'ramp_sigma_inc': None,
        'phase':          0,
        'type':           'const',
    },
    analyze_and_display = True,

update_pulse_probe_ge(
    qspec          = qspec_ge,
    config_thisrun = config_thisrun,

t2_ge = do_t2_ramsey(
    config_thisrun      = config_thisrun,
    cfg_dict            = cfg_dict,
    prepulse            = {},
    postpulse           = {},
    start               = 0.01,
    step_size           = 0.02,
    expts               = 500,
    ramsey_freq         = 0.6,
    reps                = 500,
    rounds              = 1,
    sigma               = config_thisrun.device.qubit.pulses.hpi_ge.sigma,
    sigma_inc           = 4,
    freq                = config_thisrun.device.qubit.f_ge,
    gain                = config_thisrun.device.qubit.pulses.hpi_ge.gain,
    pulse_type          = 'gauss',
    analyze_and_display = False,
    sweep_other_param   = {},
)
t2_ge_fit = meas.RamseyFitting(t2_ge.data, config=t2_ge.cfg)
t2_ge_fit.analyze(fitparams=[None, 0.5, None, None, None, None])
t2_ge_fit.display(title_str='T2_ge')

update_t2_ramsey_ge(
    t2ramsey       = t2_ge_fit,
    config_thisrun = config_thisrun,

rabi_ge = do_rabi(
    config_thisrun      = config_thisrun,
    cfg_dict            = cfg_dict,
    start               = 0.001,
    expts               = 300,
    reps                = 500,
    rounds              = 1,
    pulse_type          = 'gauss',
    sweep               = 'amp',
    chan                = config_thisrun.hw.soc.dacs.qubit.ch,
    freq                = config_thisrun.device.qubit.f_ge,
    gain                = 0.0,
    sigma               = 0.03,
    sigma_inc           = 4,
    length              = 0.0,
    ramp_sigma          = 0.02,
    ramp_sigma_inc      = 0.0,
    n_pulses            = 1,
    prepulse            = {},
    postpulse           = {},
    max_gain            = 0.8,
    max_length          = 10.0,
    sweep_other_param   = {},
)
rabi_ge.analyze()
rabi_ge.display(title_str='Amplitude Rabi ge')

update_amplitude_rabi_ge(
    amprabi        = rabi_ge,
    config_thisrun = config_thisrun,

# T2 Ramsey ge post-rabi fine tune
t2_ge_2 = do_t2_ramsey(
    config_thisrun      = config_thisrun,
    cfg_dict            = cfg_dict,
    prepulse            = {},
    postpulse           = {},
    start               = 0.01,
    step_size           = 0.02,
    expts               = 500,
    ramsey_freq         = 0.6,
    reps                = 500,
    rounds              = 1,
    sigma               = config_thisrun.device.qubit.pulses.hpi_ge.sigma,
    sigma_inc           = 4,
    freq                = config_thisrun.device.qubit.f_ge,
    gain                = config_thisrun.device.qubit.pulses.hpi_ge.gain,
    pulse_type          = 'gauss',
    analyze_and_display = False,
    sweep_other_param   = {},
)
t2_ge_fit_2 = meas.RamseyFitting(t2_ge_2.data, config=t2_ge_2.cfg)
t2_ge_fit_2.analyze(fitparams=[None, 0.5, None, None, None, None])
t2_ge_fit_2.display(title_str='T2_ge post-rabi')
update_t2_ramsey_ge(
    t2ramsey       = t2_ge_fit_2,
    config_thisrun = config_thisrun,

t1_ge = do_t1(
    config_thisrun      = config_thisrun,
    cfg_dict            = cfg_dict,
    prepulse            = {},
    start               = 0.01,
    step_size           = 0.5,
    expts               = 200,
    reps                = 300,
    rounds              = 1,
    sigma               = config_thisrun.device.qubit.pulses.pi_ge.sigma,
    sigma_inc           = 4,
    freq                = config_thisrun.device.qubit.f_ge,
    gain                = config_thisrun.device.qubit.pulses.pi_ge.gain,
    pulse_type          = 'gauss',
    analyze_and_display = True,
## Qubit EF

qspec_ef = do_pulse_probe_spec(
    config_thisrun      = config_thisrun,
    center              = config_thisrun.device.qubit.f_ef,
    span                = 50,
    expts               = 300,
    reps                = 100,
    rounds              = 1,
    pulse_e             = False,
    prepulse            = {'pi_qubit_ge': {}},
    postpulse           = {'pi_qubit_ge': {}},
    sweep_other_param   = None,
    probe_pulse_param   = {
        'gain':           0.05,
        'length':         0.35,
        'freq':           None,
        'chan':           config_thisrun.hw.soc.dacs.qubit.ch,
        'sigma':          0,
        'sigma_inc':      0,
        'ramp_sigma':     None,
        'ramp_sigma_inc': None,
        'phase':          0,
        'type':           'const',
    },
    analyze_and_display = True,

update_pulse_probe_ef(
    qspec          = qspec_ef,
    config_thisrun = config_thisrun,

t2_ef = do_t2_ramsey(
    config_thisrun      = config_thisrun,
    cfg_dict            = cfg_dict,
    prepulse            = {'pi_qubit_ge': {}},
    postpulse           = {'pi_qubit_ge': {}},
    start               = 0.01,
    step_size           = 0.02,
    expts               = 500,
    ramsey_freq         = 0.6,
    reps                = 300,
    rounds              = 1,
    sigma               = config_thisrun.device.qubit.pulses.hpi_ef.sigma,
    sigma_inc           = 4,
    freq                = config_thisrun.device.qubit.f_ef,
    gain                = config_thisrun.device.qubit.pulses.hpi_ef.gain,
    pulse_type          = 'gauss',
    analyze_and_display = False,
    sweep_other_param   = {},
)
t2_ef_fit = meas.RamseyFitting(t2_ef.data, config=t2_ef.cfg)
t2_ef_fit.analyze(fitparams=[None, 0.5, None, None, None, None])
t2_ef_fit.display(title_str='T2_ef')

update_t2_ramsey_ef(
    t2ramsey       = t2_ef_fit,
    config_thisrun = config_thisrun,

rabi_ef = do_rabi(
    config_thisrun      = config_thisrun,
    cfg_dict            = cfg_dict,
    start               = 0.001,
    expts               = 151,
    reps                = 100,
    rounds              = 1,
    pulse_type          = 'gauss',
    sweep               = 'amp',
    chan                = config_thisrun.hw.soc.dacs.qubit.ch,
    freq                = config_thisrun.device.qubit.f_ef,
    gain                = 0.0,
    sigma               = 0.03,
    sigma_inc           = 4,
    length              = 0.0,
    ramp_sigma          = 0.02,
    ramp_sigma_inc      = 0.0,
    n_pulses            = 1,
    prepulse            = {'pi_qubit_ge': {}},
    postpulse           = {'pi_qubit_ge': {}},
    max_gain            = 1.0,
    max_length          = 10.0,
    sweep_other_param   = {},
)
rabi_ef.analyze()
rabi_ef.display(title_str='Amplitude Rabi ef')

update_amplitude_rabi_ef(
    amprabi        = rabi_ef,
    config_thisrun = config_thisrun,

# T2 Ramsey ef post-rabi fine tune
t2_ef_2 = do_t2_ramsey(
    config_thisrun      = config_thisrun,
    cfg_dict            = cfg_dict,
    prepulse            = {'pi_qubit_ge': {}},
    postpulse           = {'pi_qubit_ge': {}},
    start               = 0.01,
    step_size           = 0.02,
    expts               = 500,
    ramsey_freq         = 0.6,
    reps                = 300,
    rounds              = 1,
    sigma               = config_thisrun.device.qubit.pulses.hpi_ef.sigma,
    sigma_inc           = 4,
    freq                = config_thisrun.device.qubit.f_ef,
    gain                = config_thisrun.device.qubit.pulses.hpi_ef.gain,
    pulse_type          = 'gauss',
    analyze_and_display = False,
    sweep_other_param   = {},
)
t2_ef_fit_2 = meas.RamseyFitting(t2_ef_2.data, config=t2_ef_2.cfg)
t2_ef_fit_2.analyze(fitparams=[None, 0.5, None, None, None, None])
t2_ef_fit_2.display(title_str='T2_ef post-rabi')
update_t2_ramsey_ef(
    t2ramsey       = t2_ef_fit_2,
    config_thisrun = config_thisrun,

t1_ef = do_t1(
    config_thisrun      = config_thisrun,
    cfg_dict            = cfg_dict,
    prepulse            = {'pi_qubit_ge': {}},
    start               = 0.01,
    step_size           = 0.5,
    expts               = 200,
    reps                = 300,
    rounds              = 1,
    sigma               = config_thisrun.device.qubit.pulses.pi_ef.sigma,
    sigma_inc           = 4,
    freq                = config_thisrun.device.qubit.f_ef,
    gain                = config_thisrun.device.qubit.pulses.pi_ef.gain,
    pulse_type          = 'gauss',
    analyze_and_display = True,
station.handle_config_update(write_to_file=True)
print('Config saved.')
